mapper.sql: log_id, warehouse_code, inventory_status, quantity, unit, qa_status, prepare_quantity, modelno, inventory_property_id, price, in_time, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, order_id, order_item, inventory_id

select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inventory_move_log_bak
order by ${orderByClause}
